type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: No activities occurred in 2023 to produce Aluminum above threshold, however stockpiled waste streams from previous years were sent offsite in 2023 for disposal/recycling which contained the element and thus are quantified and reported this year.

type.fr: Commentaire sur le statut de déclaration de la substance

comments.comment: Not used in 2023 but waste was transferred to offsite disposal/recycling in 2023.

There was no production/manufacturing in 2023 as the refinery is undergoing conversion project to a renewable fuel facility. However, waste from previous years was removed from site for disposal/recycling, i.e. used catalyst, sludge removed from wastewater basins, refractory removed from heaters for replacement, etc.
Catalyst changed out due to not being compatible for new process after conversion to a renewable fuel facility.

There was no production/manufacturing in 2023 as we are in construction phase of the conversion into a renewable fuel facility. Waste, such as sludge from the wastewater basins from previous years was removed from site for disposal in 2023.

type.fr: Commentaire sur les rejets sur le site

comments.comment: Reduced use of slop light fuel oil and replaced using butane.
less contaminated materials removed, last year removed a lot of sludge from basins from previous operations at site.
No catalyst change out and transfer in 2024

reasonsForNoActivities.fr: Autres (précisez dans le champ des commentaires)

p2Plan.noActivitiesComment: While in idle mode no pollution prevention activities have taken place. Refinery is undergoing major conversion to renewable diesel production facility and pollution prevention activities will resume when operations resume in Q3 2023.
